title: APP-BRASÍLIA-DF obtained a radar contact with an unidentified object [1991]

text_preview:
CODA – Centro de Operações de Defesa Aeroespacial [Aerospace Defense Operation Center]

Brasília-DF, 19 APRIL 91

From: CODA Commander

To: 6SC

Subject: occurrence transcript.

I – I transcribe below the occurrence related to the service from April 17, 91 to and April 18, 91.

II – COPM I (IS HERNANDEZ) informed CODA that APP BRASÍLIA obtained a radar contact with an unidentified object, at approximately 08: 10am. Such an object was detected between radial 040 and 180 of GAMA. moving away at high speed at 50NM from Brasilia, southbound, the first contact occurred at 08:10 as mentioned above,
summary: APP Brasília radar tracked an unidentified circular/triangular object at high speed; FAB Pampa Branco crew observed it for 50 min at FL200 near Anápolis Air Base.
